images.title: Edge of Ascent
images.gear: OLYMPUS CORPORATION E-M1MarkIII, M.100-400mm F5.0-6.3 + MC-20
images.field_notes: As the Egret departs, it feels like it is falling. Although it does briefly descend, this is all done in order for it to take to the sky.

images.title: Black Vulture
images.gear: OLYMPUS CORPORATION E-M1MarkIII, M.100-400mm F5.0-6.3 + MC-20
images.field_notes: I've always been fascinated with Black Vultures. While many species shy away from human presence, the vulture is remarkably bold. It doesn't skirt the edges of our world, but fully ocupies it. Their ancient asthetic, and complex social bonds are a reminder nature doesn't always have to be delicate to be magnificent.

images.title: Dinner, Alone
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-1, OM 100-400mm F5.0-6.3
images.field_notes: Seeing Ospreys always excites. They are probably my favorite raptor, even if common around the world. This one had found its dinner and was taking it somewhere more private to eat.
